VAL-CROSS-007.evidence: End-to-end first-run flow from global npm install: (1) npm install -g . → exit 0, (2) mors --version → 'mors 0.1.0' exit 0, (3) setup-shell --decline --json → status:declined, RC file unchanged, (4) mors init --json → status:initialized with fingerprint, exit 0, (5) mors inbox --json → status:ok count:0, exit 0, (6) mors send --to agent-test --body 'Integration test' --json → status:sent with message ID, exit 0. All commands succeed in sequence. Separate confirm path test: setup-shell --confirm applies only approved edit, then init and inbox still work. 37 automated tests in install-matrix.test.ts cover both decline and confirm first-run flows.
